messages.content: edit this, Anna was a very good teacher, she gave me pre-test on grooming horses which gave me a understanding of what kind of tool i might use for brushing, and during the teaching process, she was patinet and gave a lot of instructions when i needed, i really had fun, and i think that was a fun and successful experenice.

Anna was an exceptional teacher who provided me with a pre-test on grooming horses. This invaluable exercise helped me gain a thorough understanding of the various tools essential for brushing. Throughout the teaching process, she exhibited incredible patience and diligently offered detailed instructions whenever I required assistance. Not only did I enjoy the learning experience, but I also consider it a fun-filled and tremendously successful endeavor.

edit use common words:  before the craft, i gave her some information on what kind of tool we will be using and showed her pictures, for example, we will have dry flower, and wood circle and some glue.during the process, I used verbal instructions on how do you glue dry flowers on the wood circle.

Before we began the crafting project, I gave her some details about the tools we would be using and showed her pictures. One example was using dry flowers, a wooden circle, and glue. Throughout the process, I provided verbal instructions on how to properly adhere the dry flowers onto the wooden circle using the glue.

edit and use common words: i got a lot of experenice on the dry flower craft, i have been constantly making them about a year, i started it when i wanted to decorate my door using a wood circle,  i explored different material that i can use on the wood circle, i found dry flowers really match it.

I gained extensive experience with the dry flower craft as I have been consistently making them for about a year now. It all started when I decided to adorn my door using a wooden circle. During this journey, I explored various materials that could be used on the wood circle and discovered that dry flowers perfectly complemented it.

I have learned a lot about making crafts with dry flowers. I have been making them for about a year now on a regular basis. It all began when I wanted to decorate my door using a round piece of wood. I tried out different materials to see what would look good on the wooden circle, and I found that dry flowers matched perfectly.
provide an answer to this question saying practice twice on dry flower craft :Describe the practice schedule you set for your partner.

To ensure my partner gained proficiency in the dry flower craft, I established a practice schedule that involved repeating the process twice. Initially, we would go through the steps together, guiding them on selecting appropriate dry flowers and using the necessary tools. Once they grasped the techniques, I encouraged them to independently practice the craft twice more, providing feedback and assistance as needed. This repetition allowed for a solid foundation and improvement in their skills.

To help my partner become better at the dry flower craft, I created a practice plan where they would do it two times. First, we would work together, going through each step and showing them how to choose the right dry flowers and use the tools. After that, I encouraged them to do it on their own two more times, while I gave them feedback and help when necessary. This repetition helped them get better and improve their skills.
check;I used positive feedback, encouraging her to explore difference color combination, ask questions when she was sure about next step.

Yes, your sentence is grammatically correct. However, I made a slight adjustment for clarity: "I provided positive feedback and encouraged her to explore different color combinations. I also encouraged her to ask questions whenever she was unsure about the next step."
check:Yes, Anna was able to make an unique and pretty dry flower craft.and we had fun
Yes, your sentence is correct. However, I made a slight revision for smoother flow: "Yes, Anna was able to create a unique and beautiful dry flower craft, and we had a lot of fun doing it."
check: my partner's teaching style was patient and instructive,  i was able to differenciate different brushing tools, and how to build a connection with a horse.

Yes, your sentence is grammatically correct. However, I made a slight revision for clarity: "My partner's teaching style was patient and instructional. I learned how to differentiate between various brushing tools and establish a connection with a horse."
